title: Simply Redstonized
description: A performance-focused redstone modpack made with my favorite mods and resource packs.
body:
# ⚡ Simply Redstonized

Simply Redstonized is a custom-built, performance-optimized Fabric modpack created specifically with redstone builders, technical Minecraft players, and engineering enthusiasts in mind.

It's built on the foundations of Simply Optimized for exceptional performance, but carefully enhanced and fine-tuned with additional redstone-focused tools and features that I personally love using. This pack prioritizes stable FPS and responsive gameplay while providing you all the essential tools for redstone creativity.

> ⚠️ **Important:** Please **do not press "Update All"** in the Modrinth Launcher. Some mods use specific versions intentionally — newer versions may break functionality or compatibility.

## 🎯 Key Features

- 🚀 **Performance-first:** Featuring Sodium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, VMP, and Iris for a smooth, lag-free experience even in large-scale redstone builds.

- 🔧 **Redstone Utilities:** Essential tools including Litematica, Carpet mod, MiniHUD, Tweakeroo, and WorldEdit for precise building and seamless experimentation.

- 🎥 **Advanced Recording & Playback:** Includes G4mespeed and G4mespeed Capture & Playback mods, perfect for debugging, showcasing, and analyzing complex redstone contraptions frame by frame.

- ✨ **Quality of Life Enhancements:** Packed with convenient tweaks, UI improvements, chat enhancements, and client-side optimizations to streamline your gameplay experience.

- 🎨 **Custom Resource Packs:** Hand-picked textures and visual tweaks to make technical Minecraft not just functional, but visually enjoyable as well.

## 📌 Who Is This Pack For?

This is not a one-size-fits-all modpack—it's my personal setup. If you're a redstoner, engineer, or someone who enjoys the technical side of Minecraft, this pack will provide the performance, tools, and comfort you need.

Dive in, build complex circuits, debug efficiently, record cinematic showcases, and enjoy a hassle-free technical Minecraft experience!

---

⚙️ *Includes configuration files from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simply-optimized).*

_This pack is a personal derivative and is not affiliated with the original Simply Optimized team._
